Hi, my name is Mario Larsen.
This is my blog.
Want to know more about me ?
resume.subTitle:
Young and talented French Engineer
looking for an interesting job in the field of AI research,
Web and Mobile development or Electronic design

ensea.name: ENSEA, École Nationale Supérieur de l'Électronique et de ses applications
ensea.text:
Leading French graduate school in electrical engineering, computer science and communication network.
More than 10 school professional projects were completed, such as Reinforcement Learning Solver or Relation Network Video Classifier
ensea.result: Graduated in major signal and artificial intelligence

civ.name: CIV, Centre International de Valbonne
civ.text: Intensive courses to prepare nationwide competitive exams for the top French engineering schools (GEs)
civ.result: Qualified for Centrale-Supélec, Mines-Télécom and Concours Communs Polytechniques schools

parc.name: Parc Impérial
parc.result: Baccalaureate specialized in sciences - equivalent A-levels in math with honors

galadrim.name: GALADRIM
galadrim.result: 7 web and mobile application built and deployed

cea.name: CEA-LIST / DIASI: AI Department in Laboratory
cea.objective: Unifying detection and re-identification in a single deep network architecture for multiple object tracking
cea.result: Our new visual transformer algorithm simplifies current approaches while performing better than the baseline model

ljubljana.name: University of Ljubljana
ljubljana.objective: Virtual Try-On Networks independent study and implementation
ljubljana.result: Technical and popularized report around CP-VTON failure, quality, measurement, dataset, and update

themis.name: ENSEA Laboratories, Themis
themis.text: Themis is a collaborative project theme proposed to a group of about a dozen ENSEA students from the 3 years of the engineering cycle
themis.objective: Design from A to Z an electronic musical instrument of synthesizer/drum-machine type
themis.result: 3 PCB designs of the synthesizer main board realized and printed in autonomy

interestsList.development: mobile game and web-app design and development
interestsList.film: film directing, making, reviewing and writing for school and friends
interestsList.running: running a lot as well as cycling
interestsList.association: association key members such as president, team manager, events organization and debate master for student life, international film festival, gaming festival, public debate, international meeting and hackathon

interestsList: following advanced courses from neurology, advanced math and philosophy to fundamental physic, poetry, and epistemology
